DTLCommonRules.ReelsSelectionExplaination1: Tap on the top reel selection button or the bottom reel selection button to activate the reel.
DTLCommonRules.ReelsSelectionExplaination2: Activating both top reel and bottom reel doubles the bet and allows the Multiplier Feature to be triggerable.
DTLCommonRules.ReelsSelectionExplaination3: At least 1 reel must be activated at all times.
DTLCommonRules.MultiplierFeatureExplaination1: Multiplier Feature can only be triggered when both top reel and bottom reel are activated.
DTLCommonRules.MultiplierFeatureExplaination2: During any spin, when both top reel and bottom reel have a win each, both wins will be multiplied by x2.

DTLGameRules.DragonTigerLuckDesc1: Dragon Tiger Luck is a 3-reel, 2-row video slot featuring x2 multiplier.

DragonTigerLuckDesc2.value: The game is played with 1 or 2 bet lines, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
DragonTigerLuckDesc2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
DragonTigerLuckDesc2.example: The game is played with 1 or 2 bet lines, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.
